rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: grant without hearing. order revised to hold share of Henry Russ Jr. until certified copy of death certificate filed (copy of birth certificate of claimant attached to 13100 affidvit) and shares of Helen G. Johnson, Marion Landry Simpson and Jennifer Marie Russ held until verifying documents filed. any share held 6 months after the date of the order may be deposited with the S.F. County Treasurer.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KELLY KRISTINE SANDVIG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property And For Order Authorizing And Directing Administrator To Transfer Estate Property.
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 13, 2016 to be after the current hearing date in the earlier filed civil case. no later than friday, april 8, 2016, the personal representative must file a Report on Status of Administration (see PC 12201) and have it set for hearing. NOTE - the hearing date is not 4/8/16. petitioner will get a hearing date when the report is filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANIEL JOSEPH COLON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory & Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. a "corrected" inventory was filed, but an amended inventory is required. that inventory must also include attachment 2 and the probate referee must sign off on the amended inventory. In addition, no bank statements were filed to support the values on the inventory.
